'''âd-l-r''' ('''kadalar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:newform|newform]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:newform|newform]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-l-r
|-
! Lemma
| kadalar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidalar|thidalar]] || [[word:jidalar|jidalar]] || [[word:shidalar|shidalar]] || [[word:kidalar|kidalar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudalar|thuthudalar]] || [[word:jujudalar|jujudalar]] || [[word:shushudalar|shushudalar]] || [[word:kukudalar|kukudalar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudalar|thudalar]] || [[word:judalar|judalar]] || [[word:shudalar|shudalar]] || [[word:kudalar|kudalar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudalar|thudalar]] || [[word:judalar|judalar]] || [[word:shudalar|shudalar]] || [[word:kudalar|kudalar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedalar|thedalar]] || [[word:jedalar|jedalar]] || [[word:shedalar|shedalar]] || [[word:kedalar|kedalar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodalar|thothodalar]] || [[word:jojodalar|jojodalar]] || [[word:shoshodalar|shoshodalar]] || [[word:kokodalar|kokodalar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodalar|thodalar]] || [[word:jodalar|jodalar]] || [[word:shodalar|shodalar]] || [[word:kodalar|kodalar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodalar|thodalar]] || [[word:jodalar|jodalar]] || [[word:shodalar|shodalar]] || [[word:kodalar|kodalar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdalar|thĂŠdalar]] || [[word:jĂŠdalar|jĂŠdalar]] || [[word:shĂŠdalar|shĂŠdalar]] || [[word:kĂŠdalar|kĂŠdalar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadalar|thathadalar]] || [[word:jajadalar|jajadalar]] || [[word:shashadalar|shashadalar]] || [[word:kakadalar|kakadalar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadalar|thadalar]] || [[word:jadalar|jadalar]] || [[word:shadalar|shadalar]] || [[word:kadalar|kadalar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadalar|thadalar]] || [[word:jadalar|jadalar]] || [[word:shadalar|shadalar]] || [[word:kadalar|kadalar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadalar|shadalar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadalar|goshadalar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadalar|gokishadalar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadalarnĂŒ|shadalarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadalarnknĂŒ|goshadalarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadalarnĂŒ|gokishadalarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadalarshĂ«|shadalarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadalarnkshĂ«|goshadalarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadalarshĂ«|gokishadalarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadalaro|shadalaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadalarnkro|goshadalarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadalaro|gokishadalaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadalarmu|shadalarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadalarnkmu|goshadalarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadalarmu|gokishadalarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadalarsher|shadalarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadalarnksher|goshadalarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadalarsher|gokishadalarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadalarng|shadalarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadalarnkng|goshadalarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadalarng|gokishadalarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadalarya|shadalarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadalarnkya|goshadalarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadalarya|gokishadalarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadalaryam|shadalaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadalarnkyam|goshadalarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadalaryam|gokishadalaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadalarnĂŒshĂ«|shadalarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadalarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadalarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadalarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadalarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadalarnĂŒro|shadalarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadalarnknĂŒro|goshadalarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadalarnĂŒro|gokishadalarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadalarnĂŒmu|shadalarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadalarnknĂŒmu|goshadalarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadalarnĂŒmu|gokishadalarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadalarshĂ«nĂŒ|shadalarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadalarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadalarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadalarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadalarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadalarshĂ«ro|shadalarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadalarnkshĂ«ro|goshadalarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadalarshĂ«ro|gokishadalarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadalarshĂ«mu|shadalarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadalarnkshĂ«mu|goshadalarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadalarshĂ«mu|gokishadalarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadalaronĂŒ|shadalaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadalarnkronĂŒ|goshadalarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadalaronĂŒ|gokishadalaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadalaroshĂ«|shadalaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadalarnkroshĂ«|goshadalarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadalaroshĂ«|gokishadalaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadalaromu|shadalaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadalarnkromu|goshadalarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadalaromu|gokishadalaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadalarmunĂŒ|shadalarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadalarnkmunĂŒ|goshadalarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadalarmunĂŒ|gokishadalarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadalarmushĂ«|shadalarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadalarnkmushĂ«|goshadalarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadalarmushĂ«|gokishadalarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadalarmuro|shadalarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadalarnkmuro|goshadalarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadalarmuro|gokishadalarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|654f723}}
